nodes.description: Finds the nearest target position for each query position.

nodes.name: Sample From Surface
nodes.description: Samples points uniformly on triangulated surfaces.

nodes.name: Sample From Surface Grid
nodes.description: Samples points on triangulated surfaces using a deterministic global projected grid pattern.

nodes.name: Snap To Closest Position
nodes.description: Moves query positions to their nearest target positions.

nodes.name: Triangulate Points
nodes.description: Triangulates ordered points and emits one row per triangle index entry.

nodes.name: Apply Rotations
nodes.description: Ensures the per-element rotation attribute column exists.

nodes.name: Attract Points To Position
nodes.description: Moves each point toward a target position using distance falloff.

nodes.name: Distance To Point
nodes.description: Computes per-element distance from position to a target point and writes it to a float attribute.

nodes.name: Distribute Points In Grid
nodes.description: Writes per-element positions distributed in a 2D grid.

nodes.description: Writes per-element positions distributed along a line segment.

inputs.name: end

inputs.name: count

nodes.name: Poisson Disc Per Element
nodes.description: Expands each input element into a Poisson disc cluster on the XZ plane and writes source/local index attributes.

nodes.name: Randomize Rotation
nodes.description: Writes random per-element rotations.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Annulus
nodes.description: Generates points uniformly over an annulus on the XZ plane.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Annulus Per Element
nodes.description: Expands each input element into a uniform annulus cluster on the XZ plane.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Box
nodes.description: Generates points uniformly inside an axis-aligned box.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Disc
nodes.description: Generates points uniformly over a disc on the XZ plane.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Disc Per Element
nodes.description: Expands each input element into a uniform disc cluster on the XZ plane.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Sphere
nodes.description: Generates points uniformly inside a sphere volume.

nodes.name: Sample Points In Sphere Per Element
nodes.description: Expands each input element into a uniform sphere volume cluster.

nodes.name: Sample Points On Sphere
nodes.description: Generates points uniformly on the surface of a sphere.

nodes.name: Build Spline From Strands
nodes.description: Builds a spline from rows that share the same strand id and are ordered by step index.

nodes.name: Distribute Points On Spline
nodes.description: Expands each input element into points sampled on a spline.

nodes.name: Distribute Points On Spline By Distance
nodes.description: Expands each input element into points sampled every fixed world-space distance along a spline.

nodes.name: Grow Strands
nodes.description: Expands each seed row into an ordered strand influenced by gravity and nearby colliders.

nodes.description: Samples a position on a spline at normalized t in [0..1].

nodes.description: Samples points where the spline changes direction sharply. Threshold is an angle in degrees.

nodes.name: Sample Spline Frame
nodes.description: Samples position, tangent, and normal on a spline at normalized t in [0..1].

nodes.name: Compute Slope Mask
nodes.description: Evaluates a per-row surface normal, writes a boolean slope mask, and optionally writes slope cosine, slope angle, and soft-falloff probability.

inputs.name: normal
inputs.description: Create a Vector3 Or Attribute parameter

nodes.name: Project Positions
nodes.description: Casts a ray from each element's position attribute in the given direction and writes the hit point back into the position attribute. Useful for snapping elements to terrain or geometry. When no hit is found, the element position is either kept as-is or zeroed depending on 'keepOnMiss'. An optional start offset moves the ray origin along the *opposite* of the cast direction so that elements sitting on a surface are not immediately clipped by it.

inputs.name: Elements
inputs.description: Input ElementSet — must have a 'position' attribute

inputs.name: Direction
inputs.description: Projection direction — normalised automatically (e.g. (0,-1,0) to project downward)

inputs.name: Start Offset
inputs.description: Distance to pull the ray origin back along the opposite of Direction before casting. Use a positive value to ensure elements resting on a surface still get a hit.

inputs.name: Keep On Miss
inputs.description: When true, elements that produce no hit keep their original position. When false, their position is set to zero.

nodes.name: Raycast
nodes.description: Casts a ray into the physics world and returns the hit point.

nodes.name: Raycast Instance
nodes.description: Casts a ray against a single GameObjectInstance using an isolated physics simulation.

nodes.name: Raycast Scene Details
nodes.description: Evaluates one ray per row and writes hit state, hit point, hit normal, and hit distance attributes.

inputs.name: origin
inputs.description: Create a Vector3 Or Attribute parameter

inputs.name: direction
inputs.description: Create a Vector3 Or Attribute parameter

inputs.name: maxDistance
inputs.description: Create a Float Or Attribute parameter

nodes.name: Sphere Cast Scene
nodes.description: Sweeps a sphere through the scene physics world and writes hit metadata per row.

inputs.name: radius

inputs.name: maxDistance
